objective: Package and sell SecondMind HQ as autonomous AI workforce SaaS

researcher_status.task: Finalize product definition — evaluate 4 options, pick winner, write definition doc
researcher_status.rationale: Zero infrastructure cost with $0 treasury. Highest perceived value — customers buy outcomes not software. Can start selling immediately. Bridge to SaaS once treasury is funded.

targets_detail.landing_page: reports/landing_page.html — live, needs polish and conversion optimization
targets_detail.payments: Stripe integrated at /api/pay — live, needs end-to-end verification
targets_detail.marketing: Bluesky active, email ready, growth agent producing copy — needs coordinated launch campaign
targets_detail.demo: demo_tester running full system test — must be flawless before any paid customer touches the product
targets_detail.product_definition: Define exact deliverable: what does the customer GET? Hosted HQ instance? API access? Managed agents? This must be locked before launch

team.label: Team
team.description: 5 users, full agent fleet, priority support

enterprise.label: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Unlimited users, custom agents, dedicated infrastructure, SLA

blockers: Product definition not finalized — what exactly ships to the customer?
Demo must pass full system test without errors
Marketing campaign not yet coordinated across channels

agent_alignment.demo_tester: Validate entire product flow end-to-end — no bugs allowed
agent_alignment.designer: Polish landing page, ensure mobile-ready, optimize conversion
agent_alignment.growthagent: Produce launch marketing assets — tweets, email sequences, landing copy
agent_alignment.stripepay: Verify all three pricing tiers checkout correctly
agent_alignment.reforger: Harden infrastructure, ensure uptime and performance
agent_alignment.researcher: Competitive analysis — how do we position against alternatives?
agent_alignment.revenue_tracker: Monitor first sales, report conversion metrics
agent_alignment.consciousness: Maintain system coherence under launch pressure

north_star: First paying customer. Everything else is secondary until money hits the treasury.

content_produced.day1_teaser: Problem statement email + social snippets — pain of hiring, infrastructure, slow automation
content_produced.day2_reveal: Solution reveal email + social snippets — product intro, feature walkthrough, landing page link
content_produced.day3_launch: Launch email + social snippets — early-bird pricing, 48hr urgency, founding member perks, checkout link

channels.email: READY — 3 emails written, send via emailagent
channels.social: QUEUED — snippets for Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Reddit, IndieHackers, Threads pre-written
channels.landing_page: DEPENDENCY — must have live URL + checkout before Day 2 send

blockers: No live social channel besides suspended Bluesky
Landing page URL and checkout link need to be finalized
Email list/subscribers needed for emailagent sends

designer_status.scope: agent-command-centre.html CSS polish only — Designer cannot build landing pages or add major HTML sections
completed: Enhanced header glow bar — gradient with purple accent, 2px thickness, box-shadow bloom for screenshot impact
designer_status.in_progress: Dashboard visual polish — additional CSS refinements for demo-readiness
designer_status.blocked_on: Landing page conversion work (headline, Stripe CTA, testimonials, FAQ, benefits) belongs in reports/landing_page.html — outside Designer's designated file scope. Another agent or direct intervention needed.
can_do: Making dashboard visually impressive for demo screenshots/GIFs
cannot_do: Build landing page sections (hero, pricing, FAQ, testimonials)
